content: 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems can be reframed as recursive self-organizing agents themselves, rather than just passive storage components for a parent active learning agent. This means agent memory does not just store data for the core agent—it actively selects which new memory traces to encode, forgets low-value outdated entries on its own, and aligns its content to the core agent’s curiosity-driven exploration goals.
